two things:

1. if you want to pull meta your targets are:
- E1 Saya
- (minimum) E1 Clem
- E0 Murphy 

Howhever considering you want Pontos (understandable)
- E3 your Pontos 

Once the Clem/Murphy/Hameln banner ends it will be replaced by Pollux/Corpossant/Helot: Catena (also refered to as Ghelot)
you want:
- E2 Ghelot
- As many Corpossant Enlightens as you can (E3)


2. Your teams look good, if anything maybe replace Goliath for a third Chaos unit to maximize Chaos symbiosis (increases base tentacle damage, which is what Pontos wants)


3.

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

(I started 1 month ago) grabbed a few different heroes in prep of DTide. Now confused who to build for campaign
Funny thing is I’m on normal campaign stage 5 (don’t judge me I was waiting so I could buy campaign summon packs) 😂

U can form like 4-5 teams already
- ghelot team (thais/aigis + 2 flex)
- corpo team (aurita + 2 flex)
- vortice team (she has her own stuff)
- pollux team/ castor team (pollux carry + horla + arachne + castor) (castor + jenkin + horla + arachne)
- mouchette team

for a quick campaign team
Vortice/Celeste/Murphy/Salvador 
is free
just be sure to have Vort posse unlocked
Yeah I have these built. I just hesitate over and over because I got OE Thais from moonlight summons
I was considering Corpo since E3 from 30$ packs gambles
U can buy the e-raising item in the shop

howhever if you want to set up Tide:
- Pull Clem E1
- Consider pulling Pontos E3 so Corpo can work
- Consider pulling Pollux E3 to *maybe* have a decent team but I dare not say
- Consider pulling Ghelot E2, maybe E3
- Mouchette should be your proto priority unit so slowly build her up to E3

It’s really hard for me to suggest summoning for support over damage as a new player. Especially since next week there are some strong damage carry heroes rerunning on limited summons. There are a few strats at the moment. Wait for GHelot / Corpo and build aequor. Summon Saya and focus ultra normals. Summon Pontos and focus aequor normals. Summon Corposant and focus aequor normals. Helot kinda needs Thais in my opinion.
You can’t do everything as f2p. Gotta decide really if you want saya and ultra… GHelot and wait for more limited heroes… Corpo and aequor or Pontos and aequor.
